strengths: 15+ years across full-stack web, with recent TypeScript/Node.js and React production experience
Hands-on AI-agent infrastructure work including MCP code generators at re:cinq
Strong testing and craftsmanship background (TDD, Vitest-era tooling, workshops on testing)
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in the resume
Limited recent Kotlin/Java exposure; secondary stack coverage is thin
Current career gap since October 2025 and short tenure at most recent role
response.justification: The candidate brings extensive full-stack experience with a strong match on TypeScript, Node.js, React, testing discipline, and recent hands-on AI-agent tooling including MCP, aligning well with the role's primary stack and AI requirement. Gaps include no stated Nest.js experience and limited recent Kotlin/Java work, plus a current career gap, though the breadth of languages and architectures suggests adaptability to the secondary stack.
